limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No dedicated AI capex dollar amounts disclosed; investment references are qualitative or embedded in broader acquisition/restructuring figures. Acquisitions (Elo, Photoneo) are proxies for AI/automation investment but not labeled as AI capex specifically.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Use cases are named and described as deployed/in-production (AI companions, machine vision, conversational interfaces) but no quantified business results (%, $, time saved) are provided in the excerpts, capping score at 4.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-factor section is present and contains detailed, company-specific AI risk scenarios with mechanisms (regulatory compliance costs, reputational harm, data privacy, IP issues), but no quantified risk exposure or named governance oversight body is cited, capping score at 4.
